import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp


def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Observation for Go1 push recovery task.
    Structurally redesigned: cleaner features, better normalization,
    emphasis on what the agent needs for recovery.
    """
    # --- Core orientation ---
    gravity = state.info["gravity"]       # (3,) gravity in body frame - fundamental for balance
    gyro = state.info["gyro"]             # (3,) angular velocity in body frame
    upvector = state.info["upvector"]     # (3,) body up direction

    # --- Position and velocity ---
    pos_xy = state.info["pos_xy"]         # (2,) XY offset from origin
    height = state.info["height"]         # () COM height
    local_linvel = state.info["local_linvel"]  # (3,) linear velocity in body frame

    # --- Heading ---
    heading = state.info["heading"]
    heading_sin = jnp.sin(heading)
    heading_cos = jnp.cos(heading)

    # --- Joint states ---
    joint_pos = state.data.qpos[7:]       # (12,) joint angles
    joint_vel = state.data.qvel[6:]       # (12,) joint velocities

    # --- Push force ---
    push_force = state.info["push_force"] # (3,)
    push_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(push_force)
    push_dir = push_force / (push_magnitude + 1e-6)
    push_mag_norm = jnp.tanh(push_magnitude / 150.0)

    # --- Previous action ---
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]     # (12,)

    # --- World frame velocity (for better navigation) ---
    world_vel = state.data.qvel[:3]       # (3,) world-frame linear velocity
    world_angvel = state.data.qvel[3:6]   # (3,) world-frame angular velocity

    # --- Computed features ---
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)

    # Direction to origin in body frame (body-centric navigation)
    cos_h = jnp.cos(-heading)
    sin_h = jnp.sin(-heading)
    to_origin_x = cos_h * (-pos_xy[0]) - sin_h * (-pos_xy[1])
    to_origin_y = sin_h * (-pos_xy[0]) + cos_h * (-pos_xy[1])
    to_origin_body = jnp.array([to_origin_x, to_origin_y])
    # Normalize direction (unit vector) separately from magnitude
    to_origin_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(to_origin_body)
    to_origin_unit = to_origin_body / (to_origin_dist + 1e-6)

    # Velocity aligned with direction to origin (world frame)
    pos_unit_world = pos_xy / (pos_dist + 1e-6)  # unit vector FROM origin
    vel_toward_origin_world = -jnp.dot(world_vel[:2], pos_unit_world)

    # Tilt angle from vertical
    upright_val = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], -1.0, 1.0)
    tilt = jnp.sqrt(jnp.maximum(0.0, 1.0 - upright_val ** 2))

    # --- Normalize features ---
    gyro_norm = jnp.tanh(gyro / 5.0)
    world_angvel_norm = jnp.tanh(world_angvel / 5.0)

    # Multi-scale position encoding
    pos_xy_coarse = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 1.0)      # coarse: 1m scale
    pos_xy_medium = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 0.3)      # medium: 30cm scale
    pos_xy_fine = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 0.1)        # fine: 10cm scale (task threshold)

    pos_dist_norm = jnp.tanh(pos_dist / 0.5)
    height_norm = jnp.tanh((height - 0.27) / 0.12)
    linvel_norm = jnp.tanh(local_linvel / 2.0)
    world_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(world_vel / 2.0)
    joint_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(joint_vel / 10.0)
    vel_toward_origin_norm = jnp.tanh(vel_toward_origin_world / 1.5)

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        # Core orientation (most critical)
        gravity,                                  # 3 - gravity in body frame
        gyro_norm,                                # 3 - angular velocity (body)
        upvector,                                 # 3 - up direction
        jnp.array([tilt]),                        # 1 - tilt magnitude

        # Position at multiple scales (critical for task)
        pos_xy_coarse,                            # 2 - coarse position
        pos_xy_medium,                            # 2 - medium position
        pos_xy_fine,                              # 2 - fine position (near origin)
        jnp.array([pos_dist_norm]),               # 1 - scalar distance

        # Direction to origin in body frame
        to_origin_unit,                           # 2 - unit direction to origin
        jnp.tanh(to_origin_body / 0.5),          # 2 - scaled direction

        # Height
        jnp.array([height_norm]),                 # 1

        # Velocities
        linvel_norm,                              # 3 - body frame linear vel
        world_vel_norm,                           # 3 - world frame linear vel
        world_angvel_norm,                        # 3 - world angular vel
        jnp.array([vel_toward_origin_norm]),      # 1 - vel toward origin

        # Heading
        jnp.array([heading_sin, heading_cos]),    # 2

        # Joint states
        joint_pos,                                # 12 - joint angles
        joint_vel_norm,                           # 12 - joint velocities

        # Push information
        push_dir,                                 # 3 - push direction
        jnp.array([push_mag_norm]),               # 1 - push magnitude

        # Previous action
        last_act,                                 # 12
    ])
    # Total: 3+3+3+1+2+2+2+1+2+2+1+3+3+3+1+2+12+12+3+1+12 = 74

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Structurally redesigned reward for Go1 push recovery.
    
    Key design changes:
    1. SURVIVAL as the dominant reward (not just a gate)
    2. Position reward uses LINEAR distance (not exp) for gradient at all distances
    3. Potential-based shaping for progress (γ*Φ(s') - Φ(s))
    4. Minimal competing signals
    5. Strong penalty for falling, milestone bonus for success
    """
    # Extract from next_state
    upvector = next_state.info["upvector"]
    pos_xy = next_state.info["pos_xy"]
    heading = next_state.info["heading"]
    gyro = next_state.info["gyro"]
    local_linvel = next_state.info["local_linvel"]
    height = next_state.info["height"]

    # Extract from current state
    pos_xy_prev = state.info["pos_xy"]
    upvector_prev = state.info["upvector"]
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]

    # ============================================================
    # UPRIGHT / SURVIVAL
    # ============================================================
    upright = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], 0.0, 1.0)
    # Smooth survival: 1.0 when upright, drops sharply when tilting
    # Use cubic: at 0.3 -> 0.027, at 0.7 -> 0.343, at 1.0 -> 1.0
    survival = upright ** 3

    # Constant alive bonus (dominant signal to stay alive)
    alive_reward = 1.0 * survival

    # ============================================================
    # POSITION REWARD
    # ============================================================
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    prev_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy_prev)

    # Linear distance penalty (provides gradient everywhere)
    # Normalized so max penalty is bounded
    position_reward = -pos_dist  # negative: penalize distance

    # Gaussian bonus near origin (strong pull to exact target)
    near_origin_reward = jnp.exp(-10.0 * pos_dist)  # 1.0 at origin, ~0.37 at 10cm

    # ============================================================
    # PROGRESS SHAPING (potential-based)
    # Φ(s) = -dist, so shaping = γ*Φ(s') - Φ(s) ≈ Φ(s') - Φ(s) = -(dist' - dist)
    # = prev_dist - dist (positive when moving toward origin)
    # ============================================================
    progress = prev_dist - pos_dist
    # Scale: 0.1m step = 1.0 reward; clip to avoid spikes
    progress_reward = jnp.clip(progress / 0.1, -2.0, 2.0)

    # ============================================================
    # HEADING REWARD
    # ============================================================
    heading_error = jnp.abs(heading)
    heading_error = jnp.minimum(heading_error, 2.0 * jnp.pi - heading_error)
    # Smooth heading reward
    heading_reward = jnp.exp(-1.5 * heading_error)

    # ============================================================
    # STABILITY (only when upright and near origin)
    # ============================================================
    angvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(gyro)
    # Gate stability reward on being upright AND near origin
    settled = survival * jnp.exp(-5.0 * pos_dist)
    stability_reward = jnp.exp(-0.3 * angvel_magnitude) * settled

    # ============================================================
    # FALL PENALTY
    # ============================================================
    # Hard penalty when fallen (upright < 0.3)
    fall_severity = jnp.clip(0.3 - upvector[-1], 0.0, 0.3) / 0.3
    fall_penalty = -5.0 * fall_severity

    # ============================================================
    # ACTION SMOOTHNESS
    # ============================================================
    action_rate = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action - last_act))
    action_penalty = -0.002 * action_rate

    # ============================================================
    # COMBINED REWARD
    # ============================================================
    # Structure:
    # - alive_reward: constant per-step reward for staying upright (dominant)
    # - position_reward: linear penalty for distance (always active)
    # - near_origin_reward: strong bonus for being at origin (gated on upright)
    # - progress_reward: shaping to guide recovery
    # - heading_reward: secondary objective
    # - stability_reward: tertiary objective
    # - fall_penalty: strong deterrent
    # - action_penalty: regularization

    reward = (
        3.0 * alive_reward                        # Stay alive (dominant)
        + 1.0 * position_reward                   # Distance penalty (linear gradient)
        + 2.0 * survival * near_origin_reward     # Near origin (gated on upright)
        + 1.5 * progress_reward                   # Progress toward origin
        + 0.5 * survival * heading_reward         # Heading (gated on upright)
        + 0.3 * stability_reward                  # Stability when settled
        + fall_penalty                            # Fall deterrent
        + action_penalty                          # Smooth control
    )

    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)

import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp


def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Observation for Go1 push recovery task.
    Clean design focused on what the agent needs to learn recovery.
    """
    # --- Core orientation (critical for balance) ---
    gravity = state.info["gravity"]       # (3,) gravity in body frame
    gyro = state.info["gyro"]             # (3,) angular velocity in body frame
    upvector = state.info["upvector"]     # (3,) body up direction

    # --- Position ---
    pos_xy = state.info["pos_xy"]         # (2,) XY offset from origin
    height = state.info["height"]         # () COM height

    # --- Velocities ---
    local_linvel = state.info["local_linvel"]  # (3,) linear velocity in body frame
    world_vel = state.data.qvel[:3]            # (3,) world-frame linear velocity
    world_angvel = state.data.qvel[3:6]        # (3,) world-frame angular velocity

    # --- Heading ---
    heading = state.info["heading"]
    heading_sin = jnp.sin(heading)
    heading_cos = jnp.cos(heading)

    # --- Joint states ---
    joint_pos = state.data.qpos[7:]       # (12,) joint angles
    joint_vel = state.data.qvel[6:]       # (12,) joint velocities

    # --- Push force ---
    push_force = state.info["push_force"] # (3,)
    push_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(push_force)
    push_dir = push_force / (push_magnitude + 1e-6)
    push_mag_norm = jnp.tanh(push_magnitude / 200.0)

    # --- Previous action ---
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]     # (12,)

    # --- Computed features ---
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)

    # Direction to origin in world frame (unit vector pointing toward origin)
    to_origin_world = -pos_xy / (pos_dist + 1e-6)  # (2,) unit vec toward origin

    # Direction to origin in body frame
    cos_h = jnp.cos(-heading)
    sin_h = jnp.sin(-heading)
    to_origin_x_body = cos_h * to_origin_world[0] - sin_h * to_origin_world[1]
    to_origin_y_body = sin_h * to_origin_world[0] + cos_h * to_origin_world[1]
    to_origin_body_unit = jnp.array([to_origin_x_body, to_origin_y_body])

    # Velocity projected toward origin (world frame)
    vel_toward_origin = jnp.dot(world_vel[:2], to_origin_world)

    # Tilt from vertical
    upright_val = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], -1.0, 1.0)
    tilt = jnp.sqrt(jnp.maximum(0.0, 1.0 - upright_val ** 2))

    # --- Normalize features ---
    gyro_norm = jnp.tanh(gyro / 5.0)
    world_angvel_norm = jnp.tanh(world_angvel / 5.0)

    # Multi-scale position (coarse for gradient far away, fine for near-origin precision)
    pos_xy_coarse = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 2.0)      # 2m scale
    pos_xy_medium = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 0.5)      # 0.5m scale
    pos_xy_fine = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 0.1)        # 0.1m scale (task threshold)
    pos_dist_norm = jnp.tanh(pos_dist / 1.0)

    height_norm = jnp.tanh((height - 0.27) / 0.12)
    linvel_norm = jnp.tanh(local_linvel / 2.0)
    world_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(world_vel / 2.0)
    joint_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(joint_vel / 10.0)
    vel_toward_norm = jnp.tanh(vel_toward_origin / 1.5)

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        # Core orientation (most critical)
        gravity,                                  # 3
        gyro_norm,                                # 3
        upvector,                                 # 3
        jnp.array([tilt]),                        # 1

        # Position at multiple scales
        pos_xy_coarse,                            # 2
        pos_xy_medium,                            # 2
        pos_xy_fine,                              # 2
        jnp.array([pos_dist_norm]),               # 1

        # Direction to origin (body frame unit vector)
        to_origin_body_unit,                      # 2
        # Scaled direction (magnitude info)
        jnp.tanh(jnp.array([
            to_origin_x_body * pos_dist,
            to_origin_y_body * pos_dist
        ]) / 0.5),                                # 2

        # Height
        jnp.array([height_norm]),                 # 1

        # Velocities
        linvel_norm,                              # 3
        world_vel_norm,                           # 3
        world_angvel_norm,                        # 3
        jnp.array([vel_toward_norm]),             # 1

        # Heading
        jnp.array([heading_sin, heading_cos]),    # 2

        # Joint states
        joint_pos,                                # 12
        joint_vel_norm,                           # 12

        # Push information
        push_dir,                                 # 3
        jnp.array([push_mag_norm]),               # 1

        # Previous action
        last_act,                                 # 12
    ])
    # Total: 4+3+3+1+2+2+2+1+2+2+1+3+3+3+1+2+12+12+3+1+12 = 75

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Structurally different reward for Go1 push recovery.
    
    Core design philosophy:
    - SIMPLIFY: fewer competing terms
    - Make SURVIVAL the absolute dominant signal
    - Position reward is MULTIPLICATIVE with survival (not additive)
    - Use a single clean exponential for position
    - Strong progress shaping to guide recovery
    - Minimal regularization
    
    Key difference from previous: No linear distance penalty,
    no separate fall penalty (survival already handles it),
    cleaner multiplicative structure.
    """
    # Extract from next_state
    upvector = next_state.info["upvector"]
    pos_xy = next_state.info["pos_xy"]
    heading = next_state.info["heading"]
    gyro = next_state.info["gyro"]
    local_linvel = next_state.info["local_linvel"]
    height = next_state.info["height"]

    # Extract from current state
    pos_xy_prev = state.info["pos_xy"]
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]

    # ============================================================
    # SURVIVAL SIGNAL (dominant)
    # ============================================================
    upright = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], 0.0, 1.0)
    
    # Smooth survival: high when upright, collapses sharply near fallen threshold
    # Key: use a threshold-aware function
    # At 1.0: 1.0, at 0.7: ~0.74, at 0.5: ~0.44, at 0.3: 0.0
    survival = jnp.clip((upright - 0.3) / 0.7, 0.0, 1.0)
    
    # Alive bonus: constant reward for staying alive
    # This is the DOMINANT signal — agent must learn to stay upright
    alive_bonus = 1.0 * survival

    # ============================================================
    # POSITION REWARD (gated by survival)
    # ============================================================
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    
    # Single exponential: clear gradient everywhere, strong at origin
    # At 0m: 1.0, at 0.1m: 0.82, at 0.5m: 0.37, at 1.0m: 0.14
    position_reward = jnp.exp(-2.0 * pos_dist)

    # ============================================================
    # PROGRESS SHAPING (potential-based)
    # ============================================================
    prev_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy_prev)
    progress = prev_dist - pos_dist  # positive = moved toward origin
    # Scale: 5cm step = 1.0 reward; clip to avoid spikes
    progress_reward = jnp.clip(progress / 0.05, -2.0, 2.0)

    # ============================================================
    # HEADING REWARD (secondary, gated on survival)
    # ============================================================
    heading_error = jnp.abs(heading)
    heading_error = jnp.minimum(heading_error, 2.0 * jnp.pi - heading_error)
    heading_reward = jnp.exp(-2.0 * heading_error)

    # ============================================================
    # STABILITY (tertiary, only when near origin)
    # ============================================================
    angvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(gyro)
    # Only penalize instability when near origin and upright
    near_origin = jnp.exp(-5.0 * pos_dist)
    stability_bonus = jnp.exp(-0.5 * angvel_magnitude) * near_origin * survival

    # ============================================================
    # ACTION SMOOTHNESS
    # ============================================================
    action_rate = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action - last_act))
    action_penalty = -0.001 * action_rate

    # ============================================================
    # COMBINED REWARD
    # 
    # Structure:
    # 1. alive_bonus: constant per-step for staying upright (dominant, ~1.0/step)
    # 2. survival * position_reward: task reward (gated on upright, ~0-1.0/step)
    # 3. progress_reward: shaping toward origin (ungated, ~-2 to 2/step)
    # 4. survival * heading_reward: secondary objective (~0-0.3/step)
    # 5. stability_bonus: tertiary (~0-0.2/step)
    # 6. action_penalty: regularization (~small)
    #
    # Key: survival gates position/heading so falling = losing all task rewards
    # Progress is ungated so agent is guided even when displaced
    # ============================================================
    reward = (
        3.0 * alive_bonus                         # Stay alive (dominant)
        + 3.0 * survival * position_reward        # Task: be near origin (gated)
        + 1.5 * progress_reward                   # Progress toward origin (ungated)
        + 0.5 * survival * heading_reward         # Heading (gated)
        + 0.3 * stability_bonus                   # Stability when settled
        + action_penalty                          # Smooth control
    )

    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)

import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp


def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Return a 1D float32 observation vector for the Go1 push recovery task.
    
    The agent needs to know:
    - Its orientation (to stay upright)
    - Its position relative to origin (to return there)
    - Its velocities (to control motion)
    - Joint states (to control legs)
    - External force info (to anticipate/react to pushes)
    - Previous action (for smooth control)
    """
    # --- Orientation / IMU ---
    gyro = state.info["gyro"]                    # (3,) angular velocity
    gravity = state.info["gravity"]              # (3,) gravity in body frame
    upvector = state.info["upvector"]            # (3,) body up direction

    # --- Position and velocity ---
    pos_xy = state.info["pos_xy"]                # (2,) XY offset from origin
    height = state.info["height"]                # () COM height
    local_linvel = state.info["local_linvel"]    # (3,) linear velocity in body frame

    # --- Heading ---
    heading = state.info["heading"]              # () yaw angle
    heading_sin = jnp.sin(heading)
    heading_cos = jnp.cos(heading)

    # --- Distance from origin (normalized) ---
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)           # scalar

    # --- Joint positions and velocities ---
    joint_pos = state.data.qpos[7:]              # (12,) joint angles
    joint_vel = state.data.qvel[6:]              # (12,) joint velocities

    # Normalize joint velocities to reasonable range
    joint_vel_norm = joint_vel / 10.0

    # --- Push force (normalized) ---
    push_force = state.info["push_force"]        # (3,)
    push_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(push_force)
    # Normalize push force direction (safe division)
    push_force_norm = push_force / (push_magnitude + 1e-6)
    push_magnitude_norm = push_magnitude / 400.0  # max force ~400N

    # --- Previous action ---
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]            # (12,)

    # --- Normalize position features ---
    pos_xy_norm = pos_xy / 1.0                   # scale: ~1m range
    height_norm = height - 0.3                   # typical standing height ~0.3m
    pos_dist_norm = pos_dist / 1.0               # normalized distance

    # --- Normalize velocities ---
    linvel_norm = local_linvel / 3.0             # typical max ~3 m/s
    gyro_norm = gyro / 5.0                       # typical max ~5 rad/s

    # --- Concatenate all features ---
    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        gyro_norm,                               # 3
        gravity,                                 # 3  (already unit-ish)
        upvector,                                # 3
        pos_xy_norm,                             # 2
        jnp.array([height_norm]),                # 1
        linvel_norm,                             # 3
        jnp.array([heading_sin, heading_cos]),   # 2
        jnp.array([pos_dist_norm]),              # 1
        joint_pos,                               # 12
        joint_vel_norm,                          # 12
        push_force_norm,                         # 3
        jnp.array([push_magnitude_norm]),        # 1
        last_act,                                # 12
    ])

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Compute reward for the Go1 push recovery task.
    
    Objectives:
    1. Stay upright (primary survival objective)
    2. Return to origin (primary task objective)
    3. Maintain correct heading
    4. Be stable (low velocity when near origin)
    5. Smooth actions (avoid jerky movements)
    6. Penalize falling
    """
    # --- Extract relevant state info from next_state ---
    upvector = next_state.info["upvector"]
    pos_xy = next_state.info["pos_xy"]
    heading = next_state.info["heading"]
    local_linvel = next_state.info["local_linvel"]
    gyro = next_state.info["gyro"]
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]

    # --- Upright reward (most important) ---
    upright = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], 0.0, 1.0)
    upright_reward = upright  # 1.0 when perfectly upright, 0 when fallen

    # --- Position error (distance from origin) ---
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    # Dense reward: exponential decay with distance
    # At 0m: ~1.0, at 0.1m: ~0.61, at 0.5m: ~0.08
    position_reward = jnp.exp(-5.0 * pos_dist)

    # --- Heading error ---
    # Wrap heading to [-pi, pi]
    heading_error = jnp.abs(heading)
    heading_error = jnp.minimum(heading_error, 2.0 * jnp.pi - heading_error)
    heading_reward = jnp.exp(-2.0 * heading_error)

    # --- Velocity penalty (want low velocity when near origin) ---
    linvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(local_linvel)
    vel_penalty = -0.1 * linvel_magnitude

    # --- Angular velocity penalty (want stability) ---
    angvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(gyro)
    angvel_penalty = -0.05 * angvel_magnitude

    # --- Action smoothness penalty ---
    action_rate = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action - last_act))
    action_penalty = -0.01 * action_rate

    # --- Action magnitude penalty (discourage large joint deviations) ---
    action_magnitude = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action))
    action_mag_penalty = -0.005 * action_magnitude

    # --- Fall penalty (large negative when fallen) ---
    fallen = upvector[-1] < 0.3
    fall_penalty = jnp.where(fallen, -5.0, 0.0)

    # --- Milestone: near origin bonus ---
    near_origin = jnp.where(pos_dist < 0.1, 0.5, 0.0)

    # --- Combine rewards ---
    # Weight upright heavily (survival), position return, heading
    reward = (
        2.0 * upright_reward          # Stay upright
        + 2.0 * position_reward       # Return to origin
        + 0.5 * heading_reward        # Maintain heading
        + vel_penalty                 # Be stable
        + angvel_penalty              # Reduce spinning
        + action_penalty              # Smooth actions
        + action_mag_penalty          # Small actions
        + fall_penalty                # Penalize falling
        + near_origin                 # Bonus for being close to origin
    )

    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)

import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp


def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Observation for Go1 push recovery task.
    
    Key design: provide rich, well-normalized information covering:
    - Orientation (gravity vector, upvector, gyro)
    - Position relative to origin (multiple scales)
    - Velocities (linear and angular)
    - Joint states
    - Push force information
    - Previous action for smoothness
    """
    # --- IMU / Orientation ---
    gyro = state.info["gyro"]           # (3,) angular velocity in body frame
    gravity = state.info["gravity"]     # (3,) gravity vector in body frame
    upvector = state.info["upvector"]   # (3,) body up direction

    # --- Position relative to origin ---
    pos_xy = state.info["pos_xy"]       # (2,) XY offset from origin
    height = state.info["height"]       # () COM height

    # --- Velocity in body frame ---
    local_linvel = state.info["local_linvel"]  # (3,) linear velocity in body frame

    # --- World frame velocities ---
    world_vel = state.data.qvel[:3]      # (3,) world frame linear velocity
    world_angvel = state.data.qvel[3:6]  # (3,) world frame angular velocity

    # --- Heading (sin/cos encoding to avoid discontinuity) ---
    heading = state.info["heading"]
    heading_sin = jnp.sin(heading)
    heading_cos = jnp.cos(heading)

    # --- Joint states ---
    joint_pos = state.data.qpos[7:]    # (12,) joint angles
    joint_vel = state.data.qvel[6:]    # (12,) joint velocities

    # --- Push force info ---
    push_force = state.info["push_force"]  # (3,)
    push_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(push_force)
    push_dir = push_force / (push_magnitude + 1e-6)
    push_mag_norm = jnp.tanh(push_magnitude / 200.0)
    is_being_pushed = jnp.tanh(push_magnitude / 50.0)

    # --- Previous action ---
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]   # (12,)

    # --- Derived features ---
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    
    # Tilt magnitude
    tilt_magnitude = jnp.sqrt(jnp.maximum(0.0, 1.0 - upvector[-1] ** 2))

    # Direction to origin in body frame (rotate -pos_xy by -heading)
    cos_h = jnp.cos(-heading)
    sin_h = jnp.sin(-heading)
    to_origin_x = cos_h * (-pos_xy[0]) - sin_h * (-pos_xy[1])
    to_origin_y = sin_h * (-pos_xy[0]) + cos_h * (-pos_xy[1])
    to_origin_body = jnp.array([to_origin_x, to_origin_y])

    # Velocity projected toward origin
    pos_xy_norm_vec = pos_xy / (pos_dist + 1e-6)
    vel_toward_origin = -jnp.dot(local_linvel[:2], pos_xy_norm_vec)

    # --- Normalize features ---
    gyro_norm = jnp.tanh(gyro / 5.0)
    # Position at two scales: coarse (for large displacements) and fine (near origin)
    pos_xy_coarse = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 1.0)
    pos_xy_fine = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 0.2)
    height_norm = jnp.tanh((height - 0.27) / 0.15)
    linvel_norm = jnp.tanh(local_linvel / 3.0)
    world_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(world_vel / 3.0)
    world_angvel_norm = jnp.tanh(world_angvel / 5.0)
    joint_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(joint_vel / 10.0)
    pos_dist_coarse = jnp.tanh(pos_dist / 1.0)
    pos_dist_fine = jnp.tanh(pos_dist / 0.1)
    to_origin_norm = jnp.tanh(to_origin_body / 0.5)
    vel_toward_origin_norm = jnp.tanh(vel_toward_origin / 2.0)

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        # Core orientation (most important for stability)
        gravity,                                        # 3
        gyro_norm,                                      # 3
        upvector,                                       # 3
        jnp.array([tilt_magnitude]),                    # 1

        # Position (multiple scales for both coarse and fine control)
        pos_xy_coarse,                                  # 2
        pos_xy_fine,                                    # 2
        jnp.array([height_norm]),                       # 1
        jnp.array([pos_dist_coarse]),                   # 1
        jnp.array([pos_dist_fine]),                     # 1
        to_origin_norm,                                 # 2

        # Velocity information
        linvel_norm,                                    # 3
        world_vel_norm,                                 # 3
        world_angvel_norm,                              # 3
        jnp.array([vel_toward_origin_norm]),            # 1

        # Heading
        jnp.array([heading_sin, heading_cos]),          # 2

        # Joint states
        joint_pos,                                      # 12
        joint_vel_norm,                                 # 12

        # Push information
        push_dir,                                       # 3
        jnp.array([push_mag_norm]),                     # 1
        jnp.array([is_being_pushed]),                   # 1

        # Previous action
        last_act,                                       # 12
    ])
    # Total: 3+3+3+1+2+2+1+1+1+2+3+3+3+1+2+12+12+3+1+1+12 = 72

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Reward for Go1 push recovery.
    
    Core philosophy:
    1. Staying upright is the primary survival objective
    2. Returning to origin is the task objective
    3. Use multiplicative gating: upright * position to require BOTH
    4. Progress reward provides dense gradient for recovery
    5. Minimal regularization to avoid conflicting signals
    """
    # Extract from next_state
    upvector = next_state.info["upvector"]
    pos_xy = next_state.info["pos_xy"]
    heading = next_state.info["heading"]
    gyro = next_state.info["gyro"]
    local_linvel = next_state.info["local_linvel"]
    height = next_state.info["height"]

    # Extract from current state
    pos_xy_prev = state.info["pos_xy"]
    upvector_prev = state.info["upvector"]
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]

    # ============================================================
    # UPRIGHT / SURVIVAL
    # ============================================================
    upright = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], 0.0, 1.0)
    
    # Smooth survival signal - heavily penalizes tilting
    # upright^4: at 1.0->1.0, at 0.7->0.24, at 0.3->0.008
    survival = upright ** 4
    
    # Continuous upright reward (not just binary)
    upright_reward = upright ** 2

    # ============================================================
    # POSITION REWARD (primary task)
    # ============================================================
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    
    # Two-scale position reward
    # Coarse: pulls from far away (wide basin)
    pos_coarse = jnp.exp(-1.0 * pos_dist)
    # Fine: strong gradient near origin
    pos_fine = jnp.exp(-10.0 * pos_dist)
    position_reward = 0.5 * pos_coarse + 0.5 * pos_fine

    # ============================================================
    # PROGRESS REWARD (potential-based shaping)
    # ============================================================
    prev_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy_prev)
    progress = prev_dist - pos_dist  # positive = moved toward origin
    # Scale: 5cm/step = 1.0 reward unit
    progress_reward = jnp.clip(progress / 0.05, -2.0, 2.0)

    # ============================================================
    # HEADING REWARD
    # ============================================================
    heading_error = jnp.abs(heading)
    heading_error = jnp.minimum(heading_error, 2.0 * jnp.pi - heading_error)
    heading_reward = jnp.exp(-2.0 * heading_error)

    # ============================================================
    # HEIGHT REWARD (maintain standing posture)
    # ============================================================
    # Reward being at a reasonable standing height
    # Use relative measure: penalize being too low (crouching/falling)
    height_reward = jnp.clip(height / 0.25, 0.0, 1.0)

    # ============================================================
    # STABILITY (when near origin)
    # ============================================================
    angvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(gyro)
    linvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(local_linvel)
    
    # Only reward stability when near origin (don't penalize movement during recovery)
    near_origin_weight = jnp.exp(-5.0 * pos_dist)
    stability_reward = (
        jnp.exp(-0.5 * angvel_magnitude) + 
        jnp.exp(-0.3 * linvel_magnitude)
    ) * 0.5 * near_origin_weight

    # ============================================================
    # NEAR ORIGIN BONUS (milestone for task success threshold)
    # ============================================================
    # Strong bonus for being within 10cm (task success threshold)
    near_origin_bonus = jnp.exp(-20.0 * pos_dist)

    # ============================================================
    # FALL PENALTY
    # ============================================================
    fall_severity = jnp.clip(0.3 - upvector[-1], 0.0, 0.3) / 0.3
    fall_penalty = -5.0 * fall_severity

    # ============================================================
    # ACTION REGULARIZATION
    # ============================================================
    action_rate = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action - last_act))
    action_penalty = -0.002 * action_rate
    
    action_magnitude = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action))
    action_mag_penalty = -0.001 * action_magnitude

    # ============================================================
    # COMBINED REWARD
    # ============================================================
    # Core: survival gates position and heading multiplicatively
    # This ensures the agent must BOTH stay upright AND be near origin
    core = survival * (
        3.0 * position_reward    # Primary: be near origin
        + 0.5 * heading_reward   # Secondary: maintain heading
        + 0.3 * height_reward    # Tertiary: maintain height
    )
    
    # Additive components
    reward = (
        2.0 * upright_reward     # Upright survival (additive to always encourage)
        + core                   # Gated task rewards
        + 1.0 * progress_reward  # Progress toward origin (ungated - helps recovery)
        + 1.0 * near_origin_bonus  # Milestone bonus
        + 0.5 * stability_reward   # Stability when settled
        + fall_penalty           # Hard fall deterrent
        + action_penalty         # Smooth actions
        + action_mag_penalty     # Small actions
    )

    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)

import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp


def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Observation for Go1 push recovery task.
    Provides comprehensive but well-normalized information.
    """
    # --- IMU / Orientation ---
    gyro = state.info["gyro"]           # (3,) angular velocity in body frame
    gravity = state.info["gravity"]     # (3,) gravity vector in body frame (key for balance)
    upvector = state.info["upvector"]   # (3,) body up direction

    # --- Position relative to origin ---
    pos_xy = state.info["pos_xy"]       # (2,) XY offset from origin
    height = state.info["height"]       # () COM height

    # --- Velocity in body frame ---
    local_linvel = state.info["local_linvel"]  # (3,) linear velocity in body frame

    # --- Heading (encoded as sin/cos to avoid discontinuity) ---
    heading = state.info["heading"]
    heading_sin = jnp.sin(heading)
    heading_cos = jnp.cos(heading)

    # --- Joint states ---
    joint_pos = state.data.qpos[7:]    # (12,) joint angles
    joint_vel = state.data.qvel[6:]    # (12,) joint velocities

    # --- Push force info ---
    push_force = state.info["push_force"]  # (3,)
    push_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(push_force)
    push_dir = push_force / (push_magnitude + 1e-6)  # normalized direction
    push_mag_norm = jnp.tanh(push_magnitude / 200.0)  # soft normalization

    # --- Previous action ---
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]   # (12,)

    # --- Computed features ---
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)

    # Direction to origin in body frame
    cos_h = jnp.cos(-heading)
    sin_h = jnp.sin(-heading)
    to_origin_x = cos_h * (-pos_xy[0]) - sin_h * (-pos_xy[1])
    to_origin_y = sin_h * (-pos_xy[0]) + cos_h * (-pos_xy[1])
    to_origin_body = jnp.array([to_origin_x, to_origin_y])

    # Velocity projected toward origin
    pos_xy_norm_vec = pos_xy / (pos_dist + 1e-6)
    vel_world_approx = local_linvel[:2]
    vel_toward_origin = -jnp.dot(vel_world_approx, pos_xy_norm_vec)

    # Normalize features
    gyro_norm = jnp.tanh(gyro / 5.0)
    pos_xy_norm = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 0.5)
    height_norm = (height - 0.27) / 0.1
    linvel_norm = jnp.tanh(local_linvel / 2.0)
    joint_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(joint_vel / 10.0)
    pos_dist_norm = jnp.tanh(pos_dist / 0.5)
    to_origin_norm = jnp.tanh(to_origin_body / 0.5)

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        gravity,                                 # 3 - key for balance (already ~unit)
        gyro_norm,                               # 3 - angular velocity
        upvector,                                # 3 - orientation
        pos_xy_norm,                             # 2 - position from origin
        jnp.array([height_norm]),                # 1 - height
        linvel_norm,                             # 3 - linear velocity
        jnp.array([heading_sin, heading_cos]),   # 2 - heading
        jnp.array([pos_dist_norm]),              # 1 - distance from origin
        to_origin_norm,                          # 2 - direction to origin in body frame
        jnp.array([vel_toward_origin / 2.0]),    # 1 - velocity toward origin
        joint_pos,                               # 12 - joint positions
        joint_vel_norm,                          # 12 - joint velocities
        push_dir,                                # 3 - push force direction
        jnp.array([push_mag_norm]),              # 1 - push magnitude
        last_act,                                # 12 - previous action
    ])  # Total: 3+3+3+2+1+3+2+1+2+1+12+12+3+1+12 = 61

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Reward for Go1 push recovery.
    
    Key design principles:
    1. Upright is survival - gate other rewards on being upright
    2. Position return is the task - use strong dense signal
    3. Progress reward to help escape local optima
    4. Minimal penalties to avoid conflicting signals
    5. Avoid over-penalizing velocity during recovery
    """
    # Extract from next_state (outcome of action)
    upvector = next_state.info["upvector"]
    pos_xy = next_state.info["pos_xy"]
    heading = next_state.info["heading"]
    gyro = next_state.info["gyro"]
    local_linvel = next_state.info["local_linvel"]

    # Extract from current state for progress
    pos_xy_prev = state.info["pos_xy"]
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]

    # --- Upright score ---
    # Smooth: 1.0 when upright, 0 when tilted/fallen
    upright = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], 0.0, 1.0)
    
    # Use a steeper function to strongly distinguish upright from fallen
    # At upvector[-1]=1.0: reward=1.0; at 0.3: reward~0.09; at 0.0: reward=0.0
    upright_reward = upright ** 2

    # --- Position reward ---
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    # Exponential decay - strong pull toward origin
    # At 0m: 1.0, at 0.1m: ~0.74, at 0.5m: ~0.22
    position_reward = jnp.exp(-2.0 * pos_dist)

    # --- Progress reward: explicitly reward moving toward origin ---
    prev_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy_prev)
    progress = prev_dist - pos_dist  # positive = moved closer
    progress_reward = jnp.clip(progress * 20.0, -2.0, 2.0)

    # --- Heading reward ---
    heading_error = jnp.abs(heading)
    heading_error = jnp.minimum(heading_error, 2.0 * jnp.pi - heading_error)
    heading_reward = jnp.exp(-2.0 * heading_error)

    # --- Stability: low angular velocity ---
    angvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(gyro)
    stability_reward = jnp.exp(-0.3 * angvel_magnitude)

    # --- Small velocity penalty only when near origin (settled behavior) ---
    linvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(local_linvel)
    near_origin_factor = jnp.exp(-5.0 * pos_dist)  # only active near origin
    vel_penalty = -0.2 * linvel_magnitude * near_origin_factor

    # --- Action smoothness ---
    action_rate = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action - last_act))
    action_penalty = -0.002 * action_rate

    # --- Hard fall penalty ---
    # Smooth approximation: large negative when upvector[-1] < 0.3
    fall_severity = jnp.clip(0.3 - upvector[-1], 0.0, 0.3) / 0.3
    fall_penalty = -3.0 * fall_severity

    # --- Gate position/heading rewards on being upright ---
    # If fallen, position/heading rewards are diminished
    gated_position = upright_reward * position_reward
    gated_heading = upright_reward * heading_reward

    # --- Combined reward ---
    reward = (
        2.0 * upright_reward      # Survival: stay upright
        + 3.0 * gated_position    # Task: be near origin (gated on upright)
        + 1.5 * progress_reward   # Progress: move toward origin
        + 0.5 * gated_heading     # Heading maintenance
        + 0.3 * stability_reward  # Angular stability
        + vel_penalty             # Settle near origin
        + action_penalty          # Smooth control
        + fall_penalty            # Penalize falling
    )

    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)

import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp


def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Observation for Go1 push recovery - structurally redesigned.
    
    Key changes:
    - World-frame velocity explicitly included
    - Multi-scale position encoding
    - Clear phase signals
    - Reduced redundancy
    """
    # --- Core orientation (most critical for balance) ---
    gravity = state.info["gravity"]       # (3,) gravity in body frame
    gyro = state.info["gyro"]             # (3,) angular velocity
    upvector = state.info["upvector"]     # (3,) body up direction

    # --- Position and height ---
    pos_xy = state.info["pos_xy"]         # (2,) XY offset from origin
    height = state.info["height"]         # () COM height

    # --- Velocities ---
    local_linvel = state.info["local_linvel"]  # (3,) body-frame linear velocity
    # World frame velocities from qvel
    world_linvel = state.data.qvel[:3]    # (3,) world-frame linear velocity
    world_angvel = state.data.qvel[3:6]   # (3,) world-frame angular velocity

    # --- Heading ---
    heading = state.info["heading"]
    heading_sin = jnp.sin(heading)
    heading_cos = jnp.cos(heading)

    # --- Joint states ---
    joint_pos = state.data.qpos[7:]       # (12,) joint angles
    joint_vel = state.data.qvel[6:]       # (12,) joint velocities

    # --- Push force info ---
    push_force = state.info["push_force"]  # (3,)
    push_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(push_force)
    push_dir = push_force / (push_magnitude + 1e-6)
    push_mag_norm = jnp.tanh(push_magnitude / 150.0)

    # --- Previous action ---
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]     # (12,)

    # --- Derived quantities ---
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    upright_val = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], 0.0, 1.0)

    # Direction to origin in body frame (critical for navigation)
    cos_h = jnp.cos(-heading)
    sin_h = jnp.sin(-heading)
    to_origin_x = cos_h * (-pos_xy[0]) - sin_h * (-pos_xy[1])
    to_origin_y = sin_h * (-pos_xy[0]) + cos_h * (-pos_xy[1])
    to_origin_body = jnp.array([to_origin_x, to_origin_y])

    # Velocity toward origin using world-frame velocity
    pos_xy_norm_vec = pos_xy / (pos_dist + 1e-6)
    vel_toward_origin_world = -jnp.dot(world_linvel[:2], pos_xy_norm_vec)

    # Tilt magnitude
    tilt = jnp.sqrt(jnp.maximum(0.0, 1.0 - upvector[-1] ** 2))

    # --- Normalize ---
    gyro_norm = jnp.tanh(gyro / 5.0)
    world_angvel_norm = jnp.tanh(world_angvel / 5.0)

    # Multi-scale position encoding: coarse, medium, fine
    pos_xy_coarse = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 2.0)       # large displacements
    pos_xy_medium = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 0.5)        # medium displacements
    pos_xy_fine = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 0.1)          # near-origin precision

    height_norm = jnp.tanh((height - 0.27) / 0.12)
    linvel_norm = jnp.tanh(local_linvel / 3.0)
    world_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(world_linvel / 3.0)
    joint_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(joint_vel / 10.0)
    pos_dist_coarse = jnp.tanh(pos_dist / 2.0)
    pos_dist_fine = jnp.tanh(pos_dist / 0.1)
    to_origin_norm = jnp.tanh(to_origin_body / 0.5)
    vel_toward_norm = jnp.tanh(vel_toward_origin_world / 2.0)

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        # Orientation (9 features - most critical)
        gravity,                                   # 3 - gravity in body frame
        gyro_norm,                                 # 3 - angular velocity
        upvector,                                  # 3 - up direction
        jnp.array([tilt]),                         # 1 - tilt magnitude

        # Position - multi-scale (7 features)
        pos_xy_coarse,                             # 2 - coarse position
        pos_xy_medium,                             # 2 - medium position
        pos_xy_fine,                               # 2 - fine position (near origin)
        jnp.array([pos_dist_coarse]),              # 1 - coarse distance

        # Height (1 feature)
        jnp.array([height_norm]),                  # 1 - COM height

        # Navigation (3 features)
        to_origin_norm,                            # 2 - direction to origin (body frame)
        jnp.array([pos_dist_fine]),                # 1 - fine distance

        # Velocity (8 features)
        linvel_norm,                               # 3 - body-frame velocity
        world_vel_norm,                            # 3 - world-frame velocity
        jnp.array([vel_toward_norm]),              # 1 - velocity toward origin
        world_angvel_norm,                         # 3 - world angular velocity

        # Heading (2 features)
        jnp.array([heading_sin, heading_cos]),     # 2 - heading

        # Joint states (24 features)
        joint_pos,                                 # 12 - joint angles
        joint_vel_norm,                            # 12 - joint velocities

        # Push information (5 features)
        push_dir,                                  # 3 - push direction
        jnp.array([push_mag_norm]),                # 1 - push magnitude
        jnp.array([jnp.tanh(push_magnitude / 50.0)]),  # 1 - push indicator (sensitive)

        # Previous action (12 features)
        last_act,                                  # 12 - previous action
    ])
    # Total: 4+7+1+3+8+2+24+5+12 = 66... let me count:
    # 3+3+3+1 + 2+2+2+1 + 1 + 2+1 + 3+3+1+3 + 2 + 12+12 + 3+1+1 + 12 = 73

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Structurally redesigned reward for Go1 push recovery.
    
    Core insight: Simplify to avoid conflicting signals.
    
    Structure:
    1. SURVIVAL reward: strong, independent signal for staying upright
    2. POSITION reward: strong, clear signal for being near origin (gated on survival)
    3. PROGRESS shaping: help during recovery (potential-based, bounded)
    4. HEADING: minor secondary objective
    5. Minimal regularization
    
    Key changes from parent:
    - Stronger upright reward with clearer threshold
    - Position reward uses tanh-based (not exp) for better gradient far from origin
    - Progress reward scaled more carefully
    - Remove velocity penalty (interferes with recovery)
    - Cleaner gating structure
    """
    # Extract from next_state
    upvector = next_state.info["upvector"]
    pos_xy = next_state.info["pos_xy"]
    heading = next_state.info["heading"]
    gyro = next_state.info["gyro"]
    local_linvel = next_state.info["local_linvel"]
    height = next_state.info["height"]

    # Extract from current state
    pos_xy_prev = state.info["pos_xy"]
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]
    upvector_prev = state.info["upvector"]

    # ============================================================
    # UPRIGHT / SURVIVAL SIGNAL
    # ============================================================
    upright = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], 0.0, 1.0)
    
    # Smooth survival: high when upright, collapses when tilted
    # At 1.0: 1.0, at 0.7: 0.64, at 0.5: 0.25, at 0.3: 0.0
    survival = jnp.maximum(0.0, (upright - 0.3) / 0.7)
    survival_sq = survival ** 2  # extra steepness

    # ============================================================
    # POSITION REWARD - use 1 - tanh for better far-field gradient
    # ============================================================
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    
    # tanh-based: better gradient far from origin than pure exp
    # At 0m: 1.0, at 0.1m: ~0.95, at 0.5m: ~0.60, at 1m: ~0.30
    position_reward_broad = 1.0 - jnp.tanh(1.5 * pos_dist)
    
    # Exp-based: strong near origin
    # At 0m: 1.0, at 0.1m: ~0.74, at 0.5m: ~0.08
    position_reward_sharp = jnp.exp(-5.0 * pos_dist)
    
    # Combined: broad signal far away + sharp signal near origin
    position_reward = 0.5 * position_reward_broad + 0.5 * position_reward_sharp

    # ============================================================
    # PROGRESS REWARD (potential-based shaping)
    # ============================================================
    prev_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy_prev)
    progress = prev_dist - pos_dist  # positive = moved toward origin
    
    # Normalize by a reasonable step size (robot can move ~0.05m/step max)
    # Clip to avoid huge spikes
    progress_reward = jnp.clip(progress / 0.03, -2.0, 2.0)

    # ============================================================
    # HEADING REWARD
    # ============================================================
    heading_error = jnp.abs(heading)
    heading_error = jnp.minimum(heading_error, 2.0 * jnp.pi - heading_error)
    heading_reward = 1.0 - jnp.tanh(2.0 * heading_error)

    # ============================================================
    # HEIGHT REWARD - maintain standing height
    # ============================================================
    # Reward being at a reasonable height; avoid crouching
    height_reward = jnp.clip(height / 0.25, 0.0, 1.0)

    # ============================================================
    # NEAR-ORIGIN BONUS - explicit milestone reward
    # ============================================================
    # Sharp bonus for being within task success region (~10cm)
    near_origin_bonus = jnp.exp(-10.0 * pos_dist)

    # ============================================================
    # ANGULAR VELOCITY PENALTY - only when near origin and upright
    # ============================================================
    angvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(gyro)
    settled = jnp.exp(-5.0 * pos_dist) * survival_sq
    angvel_penalty = -0.05 * angvel_magnitude * settled

    # ============================================================
    # ACTION SMOOTHNESS
    # ============================================================
    action_rate = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action - last_act))
    action_penalty = -0.001 * action_rate

    # ============================================================
    # FALL PENALTY - strong deterrent
    # ============================================================
    fall_severity = jnp.clip(0.3 - upvector[-1], 0.0, 0.3) / 0.3
    fall_penalty = -4.0 * fall_severity

    # ============================================================
    # COMBINED REWARD
    # 
    # Priority:
    # 1. Survival (stay upright) - strong independent signal
    # 2. Position (near origin, gated on survival) - main task
    # 3. Progress (ungated - always helps recovery)
    # 4. Near-origin bonus (milestone)
    # 5. Heading, height (secondary)
    # 6. Regularization (minimal)
    # ============================================================
    
    # Gated position: only reward being near origin when upright
    gated_position = survival_sq * position_reward
    
    # Gated heading: only when upright
    gated_heading = survival_sq * heading_reward

    reward = (
        2.0 * survival_sq             # Survival: stay upright (independent)
        + 4.0 * gated_position        # Task: near origin while upright
        + 1.0 * progress_reward       # Recovery: move toward origin
        + 1.5 * near_origin_bonus * survival_sq  # Milestone bonus
        + 0.5 * gated_heading         # Heading maintenance
        + 0.3 * height_reward * survival_sq  # Height maintenance
        + angvel_penalty              # Settle near origin
        + action_penalty              # Smooth control
        + fall_penalty                # Avoid falling
    )

    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)

    Key design principles:
    1. Upright is survival - gate other rewards on being upright
    2. Position return is the task - use strong dense signal
    3. Progress reward to help escape local optima
    4. Minimal penalties to avoid conflicting signals
    5. Avoid over-penalizing velocity during recovery
    """
    # Extract from next_state (outcome of action)
    upvector = next_state.info["upvector"]
    pos_xy = next_state.info["pos_xy"]
    heading = next_state.info["heading"]
    gyro = next_state.info["gyro"]
    local_linvel = next_state.info["local_linvel"]

    # Extract from current state for progress
    pos_xy_prev = state.info["pos_xy"]
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]

    # --- Upright score ---
    # Smooth: 1.0 when upright, 0 when tilted/fallen
    upright = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], 0.0, 1.0)
    
    # Use a steeper function to strongly distinguish upright from fallen
    # At upvector[-1]=1.0: reward=1.0; at 0.3: reward~0.09; at 0.0: reward=0.0
    upright_reward = upright ** 2

    # --- Position reward ---
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    # Exponential decay - strong pull toward origin
    # At 0m: 1.0, at 0.1m: ~0.74, at 0.5m: ~0.22
    position_reward = jnp.exp(-2.0 * pos_dist)

    # --- Progress reward: explicitly reward moving toward origin ---
    prev_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy_prev)
    progress = prev_dist - pos_dist  # positive = moved closer
    progress_reward = jnp.clip(progress * 20.0, -2.0, 2.0)

    # --- Heading reward ---
    heading_error = jnp.abs(heading)
    heading_error = jnp.minimum(heading_error, 2.0 * jnp.pi - heading_error)
    heading_reward = jnp.exp(-2.0 * heading_error)

    # --- Stability: low angular velocity ---
    angvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(gyro)
    stability_reward = jnp.exp(-0.3 * angvel_magnitude)

    # --- Small velocity penalty only when near origin (settled behavior) ---
    linvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(local_linvel)
    near_origin_factor = jnp.exp(-5.0 * pos_dist)  # only active near origin
    vel_penalty = -0.2 * linvel_magnitude * near_origin_factor

    # --- Action smoothness ---
    action_rate = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action - last_act))
    action_penalty = -0.002 * action_rate

    # --- Hard fall penalty ---
    # Smooth approximation: large negative when upvector[-1] < 0.3
    fall_severity = jnp.clip(0.3 - upvector[-1], 0.0, 0.3) / 0.3
    fall_penalty = -3.0 * fall_severity

    # --- Gate position/heading rewards on being upright ---
    # If fallen, position/heading rewards are diminished
    gated_position = upright_reward * position_reward
    gated_heading = upright_reward * heading_reward

    # --- Combined reward ---
    reward = (
        2.0 * upright_reward      # Survival: stay upright
        + 3.0 * gated_position    # Task: be near origin (gated on upright)
        + 1.5 * progress_reward   # Progress: move toward origin
        + 0.5 * gated_heading     # Heading maintenance
        + 0.3 * stability_reward  # Angular stability
        + vel_penalty             # Settle near origin
        + action_penalty          # Smooth control
        + fall_penalty            # Penalize falling
    )

    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)

import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp


def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Clean observation for Go1 push recovery.
    Structurally different: world-frame position/velocity, minimal redundancy,
    clearer task representation.
    """
    # --- Core orientation (most important) ---
    gravity = state.info["gravity"]       # (3,) gravity in body frame
    gyro = state.info["gyro"]             # (3,) angular velocity in body frame
    upvector = state.info["upvector"]     # (3,) up direction in world

    # --- Position relative to origin ---
    pos_xy = state.info["pos_xy"]         # (2,) XY offset from origin
    height = state.info["height"]         # () COM height

    # --- Velocities ---
    local_linvel = state.info["local_linvel"]  # (3,) body-frame linear velocity
    world_vel = state.data.qvel[:3]            # (3,) world-frame linear velocity

    # --- Heading ---
    heading = state.info["heading"]
    heading_sin = jnp.sin(heading)
    heading_cos = jnp.cos(heading)

    # --- Joint states ---
    joint_pos = state.data.qpos[7:]       # (12,) joint angles
    joint_vel = state.data.qvel[6:]       # (12,) joint velocities

    # --- Push force ---
    push_force = state.info["push_force"]  # (3,)
    push_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(push_force)
    push_dir = push_force / (push_magnitude + 1e-6)
    push_mag_norm = jnp.tanh(push_magnitude / 200.0)

    # --- Previous action ---
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]     # (12,)

    # --- Derived: direction to origin in BODY frame ---
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    cos_h = jnp.cos(-heading)
    sin_h = jnp.sin(-heading)
    to_origin_x = cos_h * (-pos_xy[0]) - sin_h * (-pos_xy[1])
    to_origin_y = sin_h * (-pos_xy[0]) + cos_h * (-pos_xy[1])

    # --- Normalize ---
    gyro_norm = jnp.tanh(gyro / 5.0)
    # Two-scale position: coarse + fine
    pos_xy_coarse = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 1.0)
    pos_xy_fine = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 0.1)
    height_norm = jnp.tanh((height - 0.27) / 0.12)
    linvel_norm = jnp.tanh(local_linvel / 3.0)
    world_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(world_vel / 3.0)
    joint_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(joint_vel / 10.0)
    to_origin_norm = jnp.tanh(jnp.array([to_origin_x, to_origin_y]) / 0.5)
    pos_dist_norm = jnp.tanh(pos_dist / 0.5)

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        gravity,                                  # 3 - gravity in body frame (balance)
        gyro_norm,                                # 3 - angular velocity
        upvector,                                 # 3 - up direction
        pos_xy_coarse,                            # 2 - coarse XY position
        pos_xy_fine,                              # 2 - fine XY position
        jnp.array([height_norm]),                 # 1 - height
        linvel_norm,                              # 3 - body-frame velocity
        world_vel_norm,                           # 3 - world-frame velocity
        jnp.array([heading_sin, heading_cos]),    # 2 - heading
        jnp.array([pos_dist_norm]),               # 1 - distance from origin
        to_origin_norm,                           # 2 - direction to origin (body frame)
        joint_pos,                                # 12 - joint angles
        joint_vel_norm,                           # 12 - joint velocities
        push_dir,                                 # 3 - push direction
        jnp.array([push_mag_norm]),               # 1 - push magnitude
        last_act,                                 # 12 - previous action
    ])
    # Total: 3+3+3+2+2+1+3+3+2+1+2+12+12+3+1+12 = 65

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Structurally different reward for Go1 push recovery.
    
    Key insight: Simplify drastically.
    
    Core structure:
    1. Strong ALIVE reward (just stay upright) - this is the primary survival signal
    2. Position reward scaled by upright quality - task signal
    3. NO progress reward (can be noisy/exploitable)
    4. Heading reward (secondary)
    5. Minimal regularization
    
    The alive reward ensures the agent first learns to survive,
    then the position reward guides it back to origin.
    """
    # Extract from next_state
    upvector = next_state.info["upvector"]
    pos_xy = next_state.info["pos_xy"]
    heading = next_state.info["heading"]
    gyro = next_state.info["gyro"]
    local_linvel = next_state.info["local_linvel"]
    height = next_state.info["height"]

    # Extract from current state
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]
    pos_xy_prev = state.info["pos_xy"]

    # ============================================================
    # ALIVE / UPRIGHT REWARD
    # Primary signal: just stay upright
    # ============================================================
    upright = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], 0.0, 1.0)
    # Smooth alive signal: 1.0 when upright, 0 when fallen
    # Use linear above threshold for cleaner gradient
    alive_threshold = 0.3
    alive = jnp.clip((upright - alive_threshold) / (1.0 - alive_threshold), 0.0, 1.0)

    # ============================================================
    # POSITION REWARD
    # Dense exponential decay from origin
    # ============================================================
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    # Dual-scale: gentle pull from far, strong pull near origin
    position_reward = 0.4 * jnp.exp(-1.5 * pos_dist) + 0.6 * jnp.exp(-8.0 * pos_dist)

    # ============================================================
    # HEADING REWARD
    # ============================================================
    heading_error = jnp.abs(heading)
    heading_error = jnp.minimum(heading_error, 2.0 * jnp.pi - heading_error)
    heading_reward = jnp.exp(-2.0 * heading_error)

    # ============================================================
    # HEIGHT REWARD
    # Reward maintaining reasonable standing height
    # ============================================================
    height_reward = jnp.clip(height / 0.25, 0.0, 1.0)

    # ============================================================
    # STABILITY REWARD (angular velocity)
    # Only active when near origin and upright
    # ============================================================
    angvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(gyro)
    near_origin_factor = jnp.exp(-5.0 * pos_dist)
    stability_reward = jnp.exp(-0.5 * angvel_magnitude) * near_origin_factor

    # ============================================================
    # PROGRESS SHAPING (mild, potential-based)
    # ============================================================
    prev_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy_prev)
    progress = prev_dist - pos_dist
    # Very mild shaping - just a nudge
    progress_reward = jnp.clip(progress * 10.0, -1.0, 1.0)

    # ============================================================
    # ACTION SMOOTHNESS
    # ============================================================
    action_rate = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action - last_act))
    action_penalty = -0.002 * action_rate

    # ============================================================
    # FALL PENALTY
    # Continuous penalty approaching fallen state
    # ============================================================
    fall_severity = jnp.clip(0.3 - upvector[-1], 0.0, 0.3) / 0.3
    fall_penalty = -2.0 * fall_severity

    # ============================================================
    # COMBINED REWARD
    # 
    # Key structure:
    # - alive reward is ADDITIVE and LARGE (agent must learn survival first)
    # - position reward is GATED on being alive (task only matters when upright)
    # - heading/height are secondary, also gated
    # - progress is mild shaping
    # ============================================================
    reward = (
        3.0 * alive                              # Primary: stay upright (large!)
        + 4.0 * alive * position_reward          # Task: be near origin (gated)
        + 0.5 * alive * heading_reward           # Heading (gated)
        + 0.5 * alive * height_reward            # Height (gated)
        + 0.3 * stability_reward                 # Stability near origin
        + 0.5 * progress_reward                  # Mild progress shaping
        + action_penalty                         # Smooth control
        + fall_penalty                           # Avoid falling
    )

    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)

import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp


def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Clean, minimal observation for Go1 push recovery.
    Focus on essential information without redundancy.
    """
    # Core orientation
    gravity = state.info["gravity"]       # (3,) gravity in body frame - key for balance
    gyro = state.info["gyro"]             # (3,) angular velocity
    upvector = state.info["upvector"]     # (3,) up direction

    # Position and velocity
    pos_xy = state.info["pos_xy"]         # (2,) XY offset from origin
    height = state.info["height"]         # () COM height
    local_linvel = state.info["local_linvel"]  # (3,) body-frame linear velocity

    # Heading
    heading = state.info["heading"]
    heading_sin = jnp.sin(heading)
    heading_cos = jnp.cos(heading)

    # Joint states
    joint_pos = state.data.qpos[7:]       # (12,) joint angles
    joint_vel = state.data.qvel[6:]       # (12,) joint velocities

    # Push info
    push_force = state.info["push_force"]  # (3,)
    push_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(push_force)
    push_dir = push_force / (push_magnitude + 1e-6)
    push_mag_norm = jnp.tanh(push_magnitude / 200.0)

    # Previous action
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]     # (12,)

    # Computed
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)

    # Direction to origin in body frame
    cos_h = jnp.cos(-heading)
    sin_h = jnp.sin(-heading)
    to_origin_x = cos_h * (-pos_xy[0]) - sin_h * (-pos_xy[1])
    to_origin_y = sin_h * (-pos_xy[0]) + cos_h * (-pos_xy[1])

    # Normalize
    gyro_norm = jnp.tanh(gyro / 5.0)
    # Two-scale position: coarse for large displacements, fine for near-origin
    pos_xy_coarse = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 1.0)
    pos_xy_fine = jnp.tanh(pos_xy / 0.15)
    height_norm = jnp.tanh((height - 0.27) / 0.1)
    linvel_norm = jnp.tanh(local_linvel / 3.0)
    joint_vel_norm = jnp.tanh(joint_vel / 10.0)
    to_origin_norm = jnp.tanh(jnp.array([to_origin_x, to_origin_y]) / 0.5)
    pos_dist_norm = jnp.tanh(pos_dist / 0.5)

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        gravity,                                  # 3 - orientation (key!)
        gyro_norm,                                # 3 - angular velocity
        upvector,                                 # 3 - up direction
        pos_xy_coarse,                            # 2 - coarse position
        pos_xy_fine,                              # 2 - fine position
        jnp.array([height_norm]),                 # 1 - height
        linvel_norm,                              # 3 - velocity
        jnp.array([heading_sin, heading_cos]),    # 2 - heading
        jnp.array([pos_dist_norm]),               # 1 - dist from origin
        to_origin_norm,                           # 2 - direction to origin
        joint_pos,                                # 12 - joint angles
        joint_vel_norm,                           # 12 - joint velocities
        push_dir,                                 # 3 - push direction
        jnp.array([push_mag_norm]),               # 1 - push magnitude
        last_act,                                 # 12 - prev action
    ])
    # Total: 3+3+3+2+2+1+3+2+1+2+12+12+3+1+12 = 62

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    """
    Structurally different reward: 
    
    Core idea: A single "quality" score that jointly measures upright + position,
    plus a strong continuous survival reward and a velocity-toward-origin shaping term.
    
    Remove competing terms. Make the gradient clear:
    - Be upright AND near origin = high reward
    - The product structure means both must be achieved
    """
    upvector = next_state.info["upvector"]
    pos_xy = next_state.info["pos_xy"]
    heading = next_state.info["heading"]
    gyro = next_state.info["gyro"]
    local_linvel = next_state.info["local_linvel"]
    height = next_state.info["height"]

    pos_xy_prev = state.info["pos_xy"]
    last_act = state.info["last_act"]

    # ============================================================
    # UPRIGHT SCORE
    # ============================================================
    upright = jnp.clip(upvector[-1], 0.0, 1.0)
    # Strong nonlinearity: 1.0 when upright, collapses fast when tilting
    upright_score = upright ** 4  # steeper than before

    # ============================================================
    # POSITION SCORE
    # ============================================================
    pos_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy)
    # Gaussian-like: very strong pull near origin, gentle far away
    position_score = jnp.exp(-4.0 * pos_dist)

    # ============================================================
    # JOINT QUALITY: product of upright and position
    # Forces agent to simultaneously achieve both
    # ============================================================
    joint_quality = upright_score * position_score

    # ============================================================
    # HEADING SCORE (secondary)
    # ============================================================
    heading_error = jnp.abs(heading)
    heading_error = jnp.minimum(heading_error, 2.0 * jnp.pi - heading_error)
    heading_score = jnp.exp(-2.0 * heading_error)

    # ============================================================
    # VELOCITY TOWARD ORIGIN (progress shaping)
    # Only reward moving toward origin, not just any movement
    # ============================================================
    prev_dist = jnp.linalg.norm(pos_xy_prev)
    dist_reduction = prev_dist - pos_dist  # positive = moved closer
    # Scale: 1 cm/step = ~0.2 reward (at 0.05m/step max)
    progress_reward = jnp.clip(dist_reduction / 0.05, -1.0, 1.0)

    # ============================================================
    # HEIGHT MAINTENANCE
    # ============================================================
    # Reward maintaining a reasonable height (proxy for not crouching)
    # Compute relative to a typical standing height range
    height_score = jnp.clip(height / 0.25, 0.0, 1.0)

    # ============================================================
    # ANGULAR VELOCITY PENALTY (only when settled near origin)
    # ============================================================
    angvel_magnitude = jnp.linalg.norm(gyro)
    settled_factor = jnp.exp(-5.0 * pos_dist) * upright_score
    angvel_penalty = -0.1 * angvel_magnitude * settled_factor

    # ============================================================
    # ACTION SMOOTHNESS
    # ============================================================
    action_rate = jnp.sum(jnp.square(action - last_act))
    action_penalty = -0.002 * action_rate

    # ============================================================
    # FALL PENALTY
    # ============================================================
    # Smooth penalty when approaching fallen threshold
    fall_severity = jnp.clip(0.3 - upvector[-1], 0.0, 0.3) / 0.3
    fall_penalty = -3.0 * fall_severity

    # ============================================================
    # COMBINED REWARD
    # ============================================================
    # Primary: joint quality (upright AND at origin) — this is the task
    # Secondary: heading, height
    # Shaping: progress, stability
    # Regularization: action smoothness, fall penalty
    reward = (
        5.0 * joint_quality          # Core: upright AND at origin
        + 1.0 * upright_score        # Survival bonus (even far from origin)
        + 0.5 * heading_score * upright_score  # Heading (gated on upright)
        + 0.3 * height_score * upright_score   # Height (gated on upright)
        + 1.0 * progress_reward      # Progress toward origin (ungated)
        + angvel_penalty             # Settle when near origin
        + action_penalty             # Smooth control
        + fall_penalty               # Avoid falling
    )

    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)
